bullets: Architected and deployed a full-stack SaaS platform using React (Vite) and Flask, integrating OpenAI GPT-4o to generate ATS-optimised CVs and cover letters tailored to specific job descriptions

Engineered a semantic similarity scoring engine using OpenAI text embeddings and cosine similarity, delivering real-time ATS match scores, skills gap analysis, and missing keyword detection with weighted composite scoring.
Designed and implemented RESTful API endpoints with JWT authentication, Google OAuth 2.0, and PostgreSQL persistence, deployed to DigitalOcean with Nginx reverse proxy and SSL via Certbot.

Built an AI tools suite — including Interview Prep, LinkedIn Bio Optimiser, Salary Estimator, and Skills Gap Report — enabling users to maximise job application success through data-driven career intelligence.
projects.name: FrontendJobs AI-Powered Job Search Platform
projects.technologies: React, Vite, Flask, PostgreSQL, OpenAI GPT-4o, Python, DigitalOcean

bullets: Engineered a compartmental epidemiological simulation using SEIR and SEIRD differential equation models to replicate real-world infectious disease spread dynamics across population groups.
Implemented numerical solvers using SciPy to compute differential equation systems, producing time-series outputs that tracked Susceptible, Exposed, Infected, Recovered, and Deceased compartments.

Conducted parameter sensitivity analysis by systematically varying transmission rate, recovery rate, and mortality coefficients, generating comparative visualisations using Matplotlib to assess outbreak severity under different scenarios.
Validated simulation outputs against published epidemiological data, demonstrating the ability to translate complex mathematical theory into accurate, reproducible computational models.
projects.name: SEIR/SEIRD Epidemiological Disease Spread Simulator

bullets: Architected a React single-page application using a component-based design pattern, implementing React Router for client-side navigation and dynamic content rendering across multiple views.
Built real-time search and multi-criteria filtering functionality using React hooks (useState, useEffect), enabling efficient data querying and responsive UI updates without page reloads.
Applied frontend engineering best practices including reusable component composition, prop drilling management, and separation of concerns to produce a scalable and maintainable codebase.
Implemented responsive layouts using CSS Flexbox and Grid, ensuring consistent cross-device and cross-browser compatibility across desktop and mobile viewports.
projects.name: React Task Manager — Component-Based Web Application
projects.technologies: React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, React Router

bullets: Implemented a library of core computer science algorithms in Python and Java, including binary search, quicksort, merge sort, depth-first search, and breadth-first search for practical problem-solving applications.

Performed rigorous time and space complexity analysis using Big-O notation, benchmarking algorithm performance across varying input sizes to justify data structure selection and optimisation decisions.

Solved over 30 logic-based programming challenges by decomposing problems into modular, testable components — applying dynamic programming, recursion, and greedy strategies to derive optimal solutions.
Built systematic debugging and test validation workflows, writing edge-case test suites in Python to verify correctness of all algorithm implementations before deployment.
projects.name: Algorithm & Data Structures Implementation Library
projects.technologies: Python, Java, Data Structures, Big-O Analysis

bullets: Developed an automated budget management system in Google Sheets to track daily expenses, income, and category-based spending trends.
Built custom Google Apps Script functions to automate calculations, expense categorisation, and dynamic financial summaries.
Designed a structured calendar-style layout to visualise daily spending and improve financial planning.
Implemented automated spreadsheet logic to generate monthly summaries and financial insights with minimal manual input.
projects.name: Automated Personal Budget Management System

bullets: Built an automated payslip generation system that converts payroll data from Google Sheets into structured payslip documents.
Developed Google Apps Script workflows to dynamically populate employee details, salary calculations, and deductions.
Automated document generation and formatting to produce consistent, professional payslips directly from spreadsheet data.
Reduced manual payroll processing by creating a repeatable and scalable document automation pipeline.
projects.name: Automated Payslip Generator for Payroll Tracking
projects.technologies: Google Apps Script, JavaScript, Google Sheets, Google Docs

bullets: Designed and developed a full-stack Progressive Web App (PWA) study tracker for 9 UNISA modules, featuring a module dashboard, assessment tracking, learning unit progress, and an installable mobile-ready interface built with vanilla JavaScript and Express

Built an intelligent dependency-aware study schedule generator that maps each assessment to its required learning units, enforces study-before-assessment ordering, interleaves two modules per day for variety, and respects hard submission deadlines across all 9 modules

Implemented a missed-day detection and auto-reschedule system that compares the current date against planned study days, identifies uncompleted items, and regenerates the entire schedule forward from today while preserving already-completed work

Engineered full offline support using a service worker cache, localStorage-based persistence for completion states and saved schedules, and a PWA manifest enabling one-tap installation on iPhone, iPad, and Android without an App Store
projects.name: UNISA Study Tracker
projects.technologies: Node.js, Express, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, PWA, localStorage, REST API

bullets: Built a fully client-side AI-powered code teaching platform with four core modules — File Teacher, Project Teacher, Code Compare, and Code Analyzer — that uses the Anthropic Claude API to generate line-by-line commented and syntax-highlighted code explanations for nine programming languages

Engineered a multi-voice text-to-speech engine using the Web Speech API with five selectable AI personality styles, adjustable playback speed from 0.01× to 3×, and two teaching modes that either read comments aloud or deliver a natural flowing teaching script generated by Claude

Implemented a plain-English Code Analyzer that accepts individual files or full GitHub repository imports, injects line numbers into the code context sent to the AI, and returns precise file-name and line-number references pinpointing exactly where specific logic lives in the codebase

Designed a real-time code diff engine that compares two versions of a file side by side with colour-coded line changes, paired with an AI explanation of what changed between versions and why, all rendered in a dark/light themeable single-file application with no build tools or server required
projects.name: CodeTeach — AI Code Learning Studio Website
projects.technologies: deployable via GitHub Pages or Netlify Skills: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), Anthropic Claude API, Web Speech API, REST APIs, Syntax Highlighting, Responsive UI Design

projects.name: Moments & Milestones
projects.technologies: React (Vite), Node.js / Express, Vercel, Railway, Nodemailer, REST API
bullets: Designed and developed a full-stack boutique celebration business website using React (Vite) and Node.js/Express, featuring a services gallery, enquiry system, and testimonials with resilient hardcoded fallbacks for uninterrupted user experience.

Deployed a decoupled frontend and backend architecture — React app on Vercel and Express API on Railway — with custom domain configuration, DNS record management (A, CNAME, MX, DMARC), and environment-based API URL injection.

Implemented a Nodemailer-powered contact system with SMTP/IMAP integration via a custom email address (hello@momentsandmilestones.co.za), including DMARC record setup and Outlook configuration for reliable business communication.

Built a JSON file-based REST API backend with data protection via .gitignore for customer files and .env secrets, applying responsive design with CSS clamp() and media queries across all device sizes.

Defined the complete business scope, pricing strategy, and financial projections for a Cape Town-based boutique events brand — encompassing proposal setups, balloon installations, custom cakes, picnics, and handcrafted gifts, with wedding and corporate events explicitly excluded.
